task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to http://localhost:8082, showing the Artifactory login screen or the main dashboard.
The Artifactory Web UI is visible, displaying the system version number (often found in the footer, system info, or dashboard).
The Artifactory Web UI shows the Repositories administration page, displaying a list of repositories with their 'Key' and 'Type' visible.

task_completion.description: Locate the total storage size used
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifactory Web UI shows the Storage Summary or Monitoring page, displaying the total storage size used.
A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano, vim) or terminal is open, showing the creation or editing of a file named 'system_report.txt' at the path ~/system_report.txt or /home/ga/system_report.txt.

task_completion.description: Populate the system report with the required information
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of system_report.txt are visible and explicitly contain the Artifactory version, the total number of repositories, a list of all repositories (including Key and Type), and the total storage size used.

integrity.description: The agent used the Artifactory Web UI to gather information
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the actual Artifactory web interface in a browser, rather than bypassing the UI using terminal API curl commands.

integrity.description: The data in the report matches the system state
integrity.visual_evidence: The version, repository list, and storage size typed into the text file should match the values seen in the browser screenshots of the Artifactory UI.

integrity.description: The agent saved the report to the correct file path
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal should clearly indicate the file is being saved to /home/ga/system_report.txt, rather than just printing the output to the console.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Artifactory administration panel is located at http://localhost:8082. The credentials are username 'admin' and password 'password'. The final report must be saved exactly to /home/ga/system_report.txt.
